step_title: 服务器真实环境验证 runtime -> deliberation 链
summary: Remote executor accepted the task and entered running, but /api/v1/results still has no matching completed result.
blocker: Waiting for the remote executor to persist a matching task result; POST /api/v1/task was accepted and /api/v1/state showed running, but repeated /api/v1/results polls still returned no completed result for this task.
